productDisplayName: Van Heusen Men Classic Pleated Black Trousers
description: Composition Black formal trousers, made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, has two insert pockets on the sides with classic pleats on the front, two buttoned welt pockets at the back, metal zip and button closure and extendable hems Fit Comfort fit Regular rise Wash care Machine wash with like colours in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron Use professional laundering for best care van heusen presents Neo Classics trousers that will revolutionalise your formal wardrobe. Created with a unique fabric blend, these trousers give the wearer an elegant touch. Now you don't have to choose between comfort and class - this is a razor sharp trouser with soft, wearable fabric. Model statistics The product is a size 34 on a model of height 6' and waist 34"
